title: Moving files from Dropbox on Android

posts.author: Sotiris (bootstraps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Julia-monday.com

I don’t know if its just me. But it looks like we can’t add files from from dropbox on an android tablet in the files column. It does work on apple (although it was switched off by default). We can import from G-drive but we use dropbox with our team…

Is there a way to turn it on? We have 10 samsung tablets and its the same for all…

Best,
Sotiris
